stonetop.summary: A cursed mercenary band, hungering and sun-shunning until their stolen loot is returned.

system.concept: A cursed mercenary band, hungering and sun-shunning until their stolen loot is returned.
system.description: They were a band of southern mercenaries, come north in search of treasure. They heard tell of a hdour and his hoard, trapped him in his cave, and slew him — then divvied up the loot and left. Only later did they learn why the Hillfolk fear to kill a hdour: he had cursed them all, their souls doomed to linger after death in endless hunger and thirst, to fear the sun, to be hounded like the dogs they were — until every piece of the far-flung loot they stole is returned to the hdour's cave.
